finding: Renal Lesion with Expansile Growth Pattern

differentials.name: Extramedullary plasmacytoma (b)  epithelial tumor of renal parenchyma
differentials.raw: Extramedullary plasmacytoma (b)  epithelial tumor of renal parenchyma

differentials.name: High-grade and sarcomatoid type of RCC (c)  epithelial tumors of the renal pelvis
differentials.raw: High-grade and sarcomatoid type of RCC (c)  epithelial tumors of the renal pelvis

differentials.name: Squamous cell carcinoma (d)  medullary tumor of uncertain cell origin
differentials.raw: Squamous cell carcinoma (d)  medullary tumor of uncertain cell origin

context: Renal Lesions with Infiltrative Growth Pattern Imaging hallmarks: √  growth initially respects renal contour √  invasion of normal structures √  poorly defined interface between normal renal parenchyma and lesion √  enlarged kidney with preservation of reniform shape IVP: √  decreased / absent nephrogram Angio: √  vascular encasement, pruning, amputation √  no vascular displacement CT: √  poorly marginated area of diminished enhancement √  encasement of collecting system without displacement √  replacement of renal sinus fat US: √  poorly circumscribed hypo- / hyperechoic regions √  mass arise
